  • Uses of Content in services

    Methods in services that return types with arguments of type Content
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByGenreAndDurationRange(String genreId, int minDuration, int maxDuration)
    Finds contents of a specific genre with duration within a given range.
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByNamePrefix(String prefix)
    Performs a prefix search on content names using Lexicographical BST bounds.
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByReleaseDateRange(String startDate, String endDate)
    Finds content released within a specific date range.
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByTitleAndTypeAndGenreAndDate(String substring, ContentType type, String genreId, String startDate, String endDate)
    Finds contents by title substring, type, genre, and release date range.
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByTitleSubstring(String substring)
    Finds contents by title substring.
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByType(ContentType type)
    Finds contents by type.
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByTypeAndGenreAndDateRange(ContentType type, String genreId, String startDate, String endDate)
    Finds contents by type, genre, and release date range.
    Iterable<Content>
    SearchEngine.findContentsByYearRange(int startYear, int endYear)
    Finds contents released within a year range.
    Iterable<Content>
    GraphService.recommendContent(String userId)
    Generates simple recommendations based on structural proximity.

    SearchEngine.removeContent(Content content)
